title: VersionAnnotation
description: C3 - input/output contract for one version annotation (spec F4). How an implementation produces this output is intentionally unspecified.

summary.description: One plain-English sentence. Diff for v2+, description for v1.

changes.description: Specific visual changes, most important first. For a first version: the key visual elements.

tags.description: Lowercase keywords (single words or hyphenated) describing content and change.

confidence.description: Optional self-assessed confidence/coverage (0-1). null when the implementation does not estimate it. Added 2026-07-19 so future formats with partial extraction need no contract change.
